text: I feel that I am in a place dedicated to contemplation and intellectual exploration. The first room is quiet, spacious, and minimalist, inviting relaxation and perhaps reflection. The second image excites my curiosity with its vibrant colors and emphasis on research and development. Being here, I sense the role of architecture and design in shaping how knowledge is pursued and shared—spaces like these are meant to foster creativity while giving me room to think deeply. I feel both stimulated and at ease.
